interpretation.schedulerTriggerSemantics: Agreed boundary: Eric-side emits scheduler/follow-up tool signals; Sourcy executes cron triggers (~30m cadence mentioned in action_items notes). Exact trigger-time send vs defer vs silent is meeting-noted as LLM-judged — not fully closed.
interpretation.noOverclaim: These fixtures are replay/simulation aids; they do not prove production multimodal or live supplier behavior.

title: Supplier sends Alibaba CDN product image mid-thread
